Australia's most-decorated soldier vows to fight war crime chargesBen Roberts-Smith has given his first statement since he was charged with five counts of the war crime of murder last week.1 day agoWorldHarry and Meghan's trip felt like a royal tour - except many Aussies weren't interestedThe Sussexes' four-day tour of Australia appears to have fallen flat with some.1 day agoAustraliaIranian footballers say Australia has given them 'hope' for safe futureThe duo had sought aslyum after their football team did not sing the national anthem during a match.3 days agoWorldFormer US Marine pilot loses appeal against extradition from AustraliaDaniel Duggan was arrested in 2022 over claims he illegally trained the Chinese military in South Africa.4 days agoWorldOne dead after car hits pedestrians in Melbourne, police sayA man is arrested following a collision in which police say a car mounted a kerb and struck pedestrians.2 days agoAustraliaHarry and Meghan meet Bondi shooting survivorsOn the fourth day of their Australian visit, the royal couple pay tribute to the 15 people killed in the Bondi shooting.3 days agoAustraliaMajor refinery fire won't lead to fuel rationing, Australian PM saysA 13-hour blaze at one of Australia's two oil refineries could impact petrol prices and supply.3 days agoAustralia

Features & AnalysisPrisoners handcuffed and executed: The war crime charges against Australia's most-decorated soldierFresh court documents reveal details of the five murder charges against the Victoria Cross recipient.Harry and Meghan mix charity and business on Australia visitThere are questions over whether local taxpayers are picking up any of the bill for policing the visit.'Out of control' diesel prices threaten Australia's crucial freight industry Trucking operators say their costs have doubled in a vast country reliant on the industry to deliver goods.He's Australia's most decorated soldier. Now he's at the centre of a historic war crimes caseBen Roberts-Smith's case is not only unprecedented for Australia but "extraordinary" for the globe too, scholars say.Shock, sadness and relief in town at centre of Australia's seven-month police manhuntPorepunkah has been in the spotlight since Dezi Freeman shot dead two police officers last year.
